overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a foggy wasteland at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), ascending a hillside with palm trees toward a small lit building, then reaching and walking along a highway lined with streetlights and a large digital billboard. The atmosphere is dark and moody with teal-green fog and warm orange artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy wasteland with distant city lights

agents.ego_description: walking through rough wasteland terrain toward distant orange lights visible through the heavy fog

entered.detail: orange glowing lights from a distant city visible through the fog
rough rocky and dirt ground with scattered debris
tall palm trees silhouetted against the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, foggy wasteland at night. The camera moves forward over rough terrain toward distant orange city lights barely visible through the teal-colored fog. Palm trees gradually appear on the right side as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with palm trees and roadside building

events.description: small lit building becomes visible on the right hillside

agents.ego_description: ascending the grassy hillside toward the small lit building, moving past palm trees

entered.detail: small structure with warm interior lighting and green signage on the hillside
sloped terrain covered in dark grass and low vegetation

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from rough wasteland to grassy hillside as a small lit building comes into view on the right. The camera continues ascending the slope, passing palm trees that shift from the right to the left side of the frame. The distant city lights remain visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with streetlights and billboard

events.description: transitioning from grassy hillside to paved highway surface
bright digital billboard comes into view on the right, illuminating the fog

agents.ego_description: climbing the final slope to reach the highway, approaching the road and streetlights

entered.detail: asphalt road surface with lane markings becoming visible
tall street lamps casting warm orange light through the fog
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'BRAINSTORM' with bright colors

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the final approach to the highway, leaving the grassy hillside and small building behind. The paved road and streetlights come into view, followed by a large digital billboard on the right that brightly illuminates the surrounding fog with its advertisement.

events.description: passing the digital billboard on the right, leaving it behind

agents.ego_description: walking along the empty highway past the digital billboard, following the road lined with streetlights into the fog

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the paved highway, passing the digital billboard on the right and continuing past rows of streetlights that recede into the foggy distance. The road stretches ahead into the darkness, with the distant city lights still visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, foggy wasteland that gradually ascends into a brightly lit highway corridor. It begins by moving across rough terrain under a teal-colored haze, with distant orange city lights flickering through the fog as palm trees emerge on the right. As the camera advances, the ground transitions into a grassy hillside, passing a small lit building and shifting the palm trees to the left while continuing the climb. The scene then opens onto a paved road as the camera reaches the crest of the slope, where a large digital billboard suddenly illuminates the surrounding fog with a bright advertisement. Finally, the camera walks along the highway, passing rows of streetlights that recede into the darkness toward the distant horizon.
